beacon: position: absolute; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); opacity: 0; animation: pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
grabber: width: 36px; height: 4px; background: var(--surface-2); border-radius: 2px; margin: 0 auto 12px;
opt: height: 56px; border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: var(--surface-1);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--gray-400); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500;
